overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing exploration of the Sanctuary of Isthmia at night. The player character walks through ancient Greek ruins, examines detailed wall paintings on a temple structure, and descends a path to a waterfront area with a dock and sailboat.

events.description: NPC character walks past the camera from left to right temporarily blocking view of temple wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the temple structure through the amphitheater area

notable_agents.action: walking past the camera from left to right in front of the temple wall

entered.detail: stone temple with painted blue walls and Doric columns
curved stone seating rows of ancient Greek theater
rocky hillside with sparse trees and shrubs

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of the Sanctuary of Isthmia at night, approaching a painted temple structure. The camera moves forward through an ancient amphitheater area with tiered stone seating visible on the right and a rocky cliff on the left. An NPC briefly passes in front of the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple wall with detailed ancient murals

agents.ego_description: moving slowly along the temple wall examining the painted murals and architectural details up close

entered.detail: blue wooden wall panels with ancient Greek murals depicting robed figures
fluted stone columns supporting the temple entablature
ornate carved frieze with circular decorations above the columns

segments.scene_description: The camera moves close to the temple wall, examining detailed ancient murals painted on blue wooden panels. The architecture features fluted stone columns and decorative friezes. The amphitheater and cliff are no longer visible as the focus shifts to the temple's ornate wall paintings.

events.description: turns away from temple wall and walks along dirt path beside the amphitheater structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the dirt path away from the temple, passing the outer wall of the amphitheater

entered.detail: painted stone wall with red markings on top, part of the theater structure
dense shrubs and small trees lining the path

segments.scene_description: The camera turns away from the temple wall and proceeds along a dirt path running alongside the amphitheater's outer wall. Vegetation becomes denser along the path as the temple recedes into the background on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal waterfront approach with ancient dock

events.description: coastal water and distant shoreline come into view as the path descends toward the sea
ancient stone dock and sailboat become visible on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: descending the path toward the waterfront, approaching the dock area where a figure stands

notable_agents.action: robed figure standing near the dock looking out at the water
ancient Greek trireme sailboat docked at the pier with sail raised

entered.detail: calm blue sea reflecting moonlight with visible waves
stone and wooden pier structure extending into the water
rocky shoreline with ancient buildings and temples across the water

segments.scene_description: The path descends toward the waterfront, revealing a stunning coastal view with the sea and distant shoreline. An ancient stone dock extends into the water where a robed figure stands, and a Greek trireme sailboat is moored nearby. The temple and amphitheater are left behind as the scene opens to the coastal landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the nocturnal ruins of the Sanctuary of Isthmia, transitioning from the enclosed architecture of a temple to an expansive coastal vista. It begins by moving through an ancient amphitheater area with tiered stone seating and a rocky cliff, passing a lone NPC while approaching a painted temple structure. As the camera draws closer, the focus shifts to the intricate murals on blue wooden panels and the fluted stone columns of the temple wall. The scene then turns away from the ornate architecture to follow a dirt path where vegetation grows denser, leaving the temple behind as the camera proceeds along the outer wall of the amphitheater. Finally, the path descends toward the waterfront, opening up to reveal a wide view of the sea and a stone dock where a robed figure stands beside a moored Greek trireme.
